# Moodle Connector - Full Documentation

# Moodle Connector 0.1.0

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for Moodle (Moodle Connector) enables Mule applications to access the Moodle API.

> [!NOTE] Moodle Connector is a beta connector that is subject to the Beta Services Terms at
> [Agreements - Salesforce.com](https://www.salesforce.com/company/legal/) or a written Unified
> Pilot Agreement if executed by Customer, and the Non-GA Gen AI and Non-GA Credit Consumption terms
> in the
> [Product Terms Directory](https://ptd.salesforce.com/?_ga=2.247987783.1372150065.1709219475-629000709.1639001992).
> Use of this beta connector with external systems or services consumes
> [Mule messages](../../general/usage-metrics) and is at the Customerâs sole discretion.

For information about compatibility and fixed issues, refer to the Moodle Connector Release Notes.

## Before You Begin

To use this connector, you must be familiar with:

- The Moodle Connectorâs API
- Anypoint Connectors
- Mule runtime engine (Mule)
- Elements and global elements in a Mule flow
- How to create a Mule app using Anypoint Code Builder or Anypoint Studio

Before creating an app, you must have:

- Credentials to access the Moodle target resource
- Anypoint Platform
- The latest versions of Anypoint Code Builder or Anypoint Studio

## Next Step

After you complete the prerequisites, youâre ready to create an app and configure the connector
using [Anypoint Studio](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-studio) or
[Anypoint Code Builder](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-acb).

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Use Exchange to Discover Connectors, Templates, and Examples](../../connectors/introduction/intro-use-exchange)
- [Moodle Connector Reference](moodle-connector-reference)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# Moodle Connector 0.1.0 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for Moodle (Moodle Connector) enables Mule applications to access the Moodle API.

## Configurations

---

### Config

Default Configuration

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Config_Moodle">Moodle</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The identifier of this element used to reference it in other components.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. Mule purges the instances as appropriate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Connection Types

##### Moodle

###### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>wstoken</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Web service token for Moodle API authentication.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>baseUri</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The base URI for the Moodle instance.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS Configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures TLS. If using the HTTPS protocol, you must configure TLS.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Assignments Get All The Course Assignments](#AssignmentsGetAllTheCourseAssignments)

- [Cohort Create Cohort](#CohortCreateCohorts)
- [Cohort Delete Cohort](#CohortDeleteCohort)

- [Cohort Get Cohort Members](#CohortGetCohortMembers)
- [Cohort Get Cohorts](#CohortGetCohorts)
- [Cohort Update Cohorts](#CohortUpdateCohorts)
- [Course Category Create Categories](#CourseCategoryCreateCategories)
- [Course Category Delete Categories](#CourseCategoryDeleteCategories)
- [Course Category Get Categories](#CourseCategoryGetCategories)
- [Course Category Update Categories](#CourseCategoryUpdateCategories)
- [Course Create Courses](#CourseCreateCourses)
- [Course Delete Courses](#CourseDeleteCourses)
- [Course Get Courses](#CourseGetCourses)
- [Course Get Courses By Field](#CourseGetCoursesByField)
- [Course Update Courses](#CourseUpdateCourses)
- [Enrollment Enroll Users](#EnrollmentEnrollUsers)
- [Enrollment Get Enrolled Users](#EnrollmentGetEnrolledUsers)
- [Enrollment Get Users Courses](#EnrollmentGetUsersCourses)
- [Enrollment Unenrol User](#EnrollmentUnenrolUser)
- [Enrollment Unenroll Users](#EnrollmentUnenrollUsers)
- [Grade Report Get Course Grades](#GradeReportGetCourseGrades)
- [Grade Report Get Grade Items](#GradeReportGetGradeItems)
- [Groups Assign Groupings](#GroupsAssignGroupings)
- [Groups Create Group](#GroupsCreateGroup)
- [Groups Create Groupings](#GroupsCreateGroupings)
- [Groups Delete Group](#GroupsDeleteGroup)
- [Groups Delete Groupings](#GroupsDeleteGroupings)
- [Groups Get Course Groups](#GroupsGetCourseGroups)
- [Groups Get Group](#GroupsGetGroup)
- [Groups Get Group Members](#GroupsGetGroupMembers)
- [Groups Get Groupings](#GroupsGetGroupings)
- [Groups Unassign Groupings](#GroupsUnassignGroupings)
- [Groups Update Groupings](#GroupsUpdateGroupings)
- [Token Access Token](#TokenAccessToken)
- [User Create Users](#UserCreateUsers)
- [User Delete Users](#UserDeleteUsers)
- [User Get Users](#UserGetUsers)
- [User Get Users By Id](#UserGetUsersById)
- [User Update Users](#UserUpdateUsers)

## Operations

## Assignments Get All The Course Assignments

`<moodle:assignments-get-all-the-course-assignments>`

Returns the assignments for a course, including activity details the caller is permitted to view
(Moodle assignment activity).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Assignments Get Assignment Grades

`<moodle:assignments-get-assignment-grades>`

Returns grader and submission grades for an assignment, consistent with the Moodle gradebook and
assignment activity.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Assignments Get Assignment Submissions

`<moodle:assignments-get-assignment-submissions>`

Returns learner submissions for an assignment (files, text, status, and timestamps), as provided by
the Moodle assignment subsystem.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Calendar Create Calendar Events

`<moodle:calendar-create-calendar-events>`

Creates calendar events in the Moodle calendar for the allowed contexts (such as course, user, or
category), as described in Moodleâs calendar documentation.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Calendar Delete Calendar Events

`<moodle:calendar-delete-calendar-events>`

Deletes one or more calendar events by ID from the Moodle calendar.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Calendar Get Calendar Event By Id

`<moodle:calendar-get-calendar-eventby-id>`

Returns a single calendar event by its Moodle event ID.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR

- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Calendar Get Calendar Events

`<moodle:calendar-get-calendar-events>`

Returns calendar events matching the request filters (for example, course, time window, or event
type).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Calendar Get Calendar Events For Students

`<moodle:calendar-get-calendar-events-for-students>`

Returns calendar events for the specified student view (events visible to learners in the given
courses or groups).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Cohort Add Cohort Members

`<moodle:cohort-add-cohort-members>`

Adds users to a site or category cohort (Moodle site-wide groups used for bulk enrollment).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Cohort Create Cohort

`<moodle:cohort-create-cohorts>`

Creates one or more cohorts (named batches of users for enrollment and administration).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Cohort Delete Cohort

`<moodle:cohort-delete-cohort>`

Deletes a cohort by ID when Moodle allows removal (for example, no blocking enrollment rules).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Cohort Delete Cohort Member

`<moodle:cohort-delete-cohort-member>`

Removes selected users from a cohort.

## Cohort Get Cohort Members

## Cohort Get Cohorts

`<moodle:cohort-get-cohorts>`

Returns cohorts that match the supplied search and context filters.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Cohort Update Cohorts

`<moodle:cohort-update-cohorts>`

Updates cohort metadata (such as name, ID number, visibility, or associated category).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any or Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Category Create Categories

`<moodle:course-category-create-categories>`

Creates course categories under a parent in the Moodle course category tree.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR

- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND

- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR

- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Category Delete Categories

`<moodle:course-category-delete-categories>`

Deletes course categories when Moodle permits (subcategories and linked courses must be handled per
Moodle rules).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Category Get Categories

`<moodle:course-category-get-categories>`

Returns course categories and hierarchy for the requested filters (for example, parent, depth, or
visibility).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Category Update Categories

`<moodle:course-category-update-categories>`

Updates course category fields (name, parent, sort order, description, and visibility).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Create Courses

`<moodle:course-create-courses>`

Creates new courses with the supplied settings (format, category, visibility, and other course
fields).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Course Delete Courses

`<moodle:course-delete-courses>`

Deletes courses by ID, subject to Moodle capabilities and whether the course may be removed.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Course Get Courses

`<moodle:course-get-courses>`

Returns full course records for the requested course IDs (summary, format, settings, and custom
fields exposed by the web service).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Course Get Courses By Field

Looks up courses by a single field value (for example, shortname, idnumber, or category), as
supported by Moodleâs core course API.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Course Update Courses

`<moodle:course-update-courses>`

Updates one or more existing courses (metadata, format options, and other fields allowed by the web
service).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Enrollment Get Users Courses

## Enrollment Unenrol User

`<moodle:enrollment-unenrol-user>`

Unenrolls a user from a course for a specific enrollment instance (manual or plugin instance ID in
the request).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Enrollment Unenroll Users

`<moodle:enrollment-unenroll-users>`

Unenrolls multiple users from courses in a single call, following Moodle enrollment rules for each
instance.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Grade Report Get Course Grades

`<moodle:grade-report-get-course-grades>`

Returns course-level totals and user grades from the gradebook for the requested course and users.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Grade Report Get Grade Items

`<moodle:grade-report-get-grade-items>`

Returns grade items (activities and categories) for a course gradebook, including weights and
settings exposed by the API.

### Parameters

## Groups Assign Groupings

`<moodle:groups-assign-groupings>`

Links groups to a grouping so activities can be restricted to that grouping in a course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Groups Create Groupings

`<moodle:groups-create-groupings>`

Creates groupings (containers used to restrict activities to sets of groups) in a course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR

- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Groups Delete Group

`<moodle:groups-delete-group>`

Deletes a group from a course when no Moodle rules block removal.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Groups Get Group

`<moodle:groups-get-group>`

Returns details for a single course group by ID.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Groups Get Group Members

`<moodle:groups-get-group-members>`

Returns the members of a course group.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Groups Get Groupings

`<moodle:groups-get-groupings>`

Returns groupings for a course, including which groups belong to each grouping when included in the
response.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## Groups Unassign Groupings

`<moodle:groups-unassign-groupings>`

Removes groups from a grouping without deleting the groups themselves.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST

## Groups Update Groupings

`<moodle:groups-update-groupings>`

Updates grouping name, ID number, or other fields supported by the Moodle groups API.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Token Access Token

`<moodle:token-access-token>`

Returns a web service token for the given user, service, and credentials by calling the Moodle
`login/token.php` endpoint relative to the site base URL (see Moodle web services documentation).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>username</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Moodle username.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>password</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Password for the account.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>service</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Moodle web service short name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## User Create Users

`<moodle:user-create-users>`

Creates new user accounts with the supplied profile fields (subject to Moodle authentication and
user-creation policies).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
- MOODLE:CONNECTIVITY
- MOODLE:FORBIDDEN
- MOODLE:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:NOT_FOUND
- MOODLE:SECURITY
- MOODLE:SERVER_ERROR
- MOODLE:TIMEOUT
- MOODLE:UNAUTHORIZED

## User Delete Users

`<moodle:user-delete-users>`

Deletes users by ID when the web service user is allowed to remove those accounts.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- MOODLE:BAD_REQUEST
- MOODLE:CLIENT_ERROR
